name: benchmark-slice
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec vitest run tests/unit/features/planner/open3d/svgInventory.test.ts tests/unit/features/planner/open3d/catalog.test.ts tests/unit/features/planner/open3d/persistence/phase04Perf.test.ts -t 'benchmark|perf|performance|large inventory|Phase 04' --passWithNoTests --no-coverage --no-threads
